zh.lifeSummary: 當Ella de Veterpont於1200年出生在英國林可爾史爾時，她的父親Robert de Vieuxpont37歲，母親Idonea de Builly26歲。她於1219年與William Wise II在英國戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1225年在英國戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾享年25歲，埋葬在英國戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ella de Veterpont于1200年出生在英国林可爾史爾时，她的父亲Robert de Vieuxpont37岁，母亲Idonea de Builly26岁。她于1219年与William Wise II在英国戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1225年在英国戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾享年25岁，埋葬在英国戴文希登哈姆 達莫勒爾。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Ella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. It was originally a short form of any of various compound names containing ali ‘other, foreign’ ( compare Eleanor ). It is now often taken to be a variant or pet form of Ellen . It was famously borne by the American jazz singer Ella Fitzgerald ( 1917–1996 ), and has become increasingly popular in Britain since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Ella de Veterpont was born in 1200, in Lincolnshire, England, her father, Robert de Vieuxpont, was 37 and her mother, Idonea de Builly, was 26. She married William Wise II in 1219, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in 1225, in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, at the age of 25, and was buried in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ella de Veterpont est née en 1200, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Vieuxpont, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Idonea de Builly, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé William Wise II en 1219, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1225, à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 25 ans, et a été enterrée à Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ella de Veterpont 1200 in Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert de Vieuxpont 37 und ihre Mutter Idonea de Builly 26. Sie hat 1219 in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England William Wise II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1225 im Alter von 25 Jahren in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England und wurde in Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ella de Veterpont è nata il nel 1200 nel Lincolnshire, England, sua padre, Robert de Vieuxpont, aveva 37 anni e sua madre, Idonea de Builly, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato William Wise II nel 1219, nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1225, nel Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England, all'età di 25 anni, e fu sepolta a Sydenham Damerel, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ella de Veterpontが1200年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Vieuxpontは37歳，母Idonea de Buillyは26歳であった。1219年にイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルでWilliam Wise IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1225年にイギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルで25歳で死去し，イギリスデボンシデンハム ダムレルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ella de Veterpont(이)가 1200년 영국 링코실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert de Vieuxpont(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Idonea de Builly(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1219년 영국 데폰 시데함 다머에서 William Wise II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1225년 영국 데폰 시데함 다머에서 25세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 시데함 다머에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ella de Veterpont nasceu em 1200, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Robert de Vieuxpont, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Idonea de Builly, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com William Wise II em 1219, em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1225, em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra, com 25 anos, e foi sepultada em Sydenham Damerel, Devon, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ella de Veterpont родилась в 1200 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, её отцу по имени Robert de Vieuxpont было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Idonea de Builly, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Wise II в 1219 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1225 г. в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия в возрасте 25 лет и была похоронена в местности сиденам дэмирэл, девон, Англия.
